hooks.name: vidux-pre-commit
hooks.description: Validates that code changes have a corresponding PLAN.md task entry. Prevents unplanned code from being committed.

hooks.name: vidux-checkpoint
hooks.description: Updates PLAN.md Progress section with a checkpoint entry after each commit.

hooks.name: vidux-three-strike
hooks.description: Tracks consecutive failures on the same surface. After 3 failures, escalates to move up one abstraction layer.

hooks.name: vidux-before-task
hooks.description: Pre-flight health check via vidux-doctor.sh. Runs before each scheduled task. Warns on merge conflicts, stale worktrees, high pressure, low disk. Non-blocking by default.
hooks._note: Wire in Claude Code settings.json: hooks.beforeTask or Codex lifecycle hooks

hooks.name: vidux-after-task
hooks.description: Post-flight scorecard via vidux-checkpoint.sh. Records what changed, updates Progress section, emits ledger event. Runs after each scheduled task completes.
hooks._note: Wire in Claude Code settings.json: hooks.afterTask. Requires PLAN_PATH env var.
